name: It's a Waste of Human Life!!

issues.description: Action type is ReturnToHand, but card text says 'Place at bottom of deck' — should be a custom action or different type representing deck placement, not hand return
Scope is ChooseOpponentCharacter, but effect applies to 'all Characters' (both players' boards) with cost ≤3 — should target all characters, not just opponent's

TrashFromHand with count:1 and empty filter does not match 'you and your opponent trash cards from your hands until you each have 5 cards' — should be a single action affecting both players simultaneously with proper count logic
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and different maxCost:2 is extraneous and does not correspond to card text — only one effect (OnPlay) should exist
First effect maxCost is 3 (correct), but second effect maxCost is 2 (incorrect and unexplained) — should both be 3 or only one effect with maxCost:3

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Place all Characters with a cost of 3 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. Then, you and your opponent trash cards from your hands until you each have 5 cards in your hands.

actions.description: Place all Characters with cost ≤3 at bottom of owner's deck
Both players trash cards from hand until each has 5 cards
